summary: Warm summer show highlighted by a calming Morning Dew; recording details are unclear but the performance is praised.
review: The lone reviewer gives this set a solid four‑star rating, emphasizing how the hot summer night was redeemed by a serene and awe‑inspiring rendition of "Morning Dew." No technical aspects of the soundboard or audience mix are mentioned, leaving the recording quality unknown. Overall the vibe is positive and the show is considered well worth listening to.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review (4 stars) praising the performance; no information on recording quality, so rating leans on show appreciation but confidence is low.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer did not comment on sound clarity, mix, or source type.
